name: AnimationProperties.CaptureTypes
summary: Constants that define the mode of the animation tools.

enum_values.name: Path
enum_values.summary: Camera and target movement along separate path curves

enum_values.name: Turntable
enum_values.summary: Rotate a view around the target.

enum_values.name: Flythrough
enum_values.summary: Camera and target movement along a path curve

enum_values.name: DaySunStudy
enum_values.summary: Sun movement through a specified calendar day

enum_values.name: SeasonalSunStudy
enum_values.summary: Sun movement through a specified week, month, or year
